texto: It's obvious nonsense, but it makes nice people feel good about themselves to do their bit for the planet. It's vanity of a grotesque kind to believe that mankind, and our 'carbon footprint', has more impact on the future of Earth than Nature, which bends our planet to its will, as it sees fit.
explicacao: Citação de Charles Saatchi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It's obvious nonsense, but it makes nice people feel good about themselves to do their bit for th…” articula reflexao, nature, future em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e future.

frase_original: It's obvious nonsense, but it makes nice people feel good about themselves to do their bit for the planet. It's vanity of a grotesque kind to believe that mankind, and our 'carbon footprint', has more impact on the future of Earth than Nature, which bends our planet to its will, as it sees fit.

texto: I hate to sound like a romantic adolescent, but I believe artists don't generally see art as a career choice; they simply can't overcome their desire to make art, and will live on little income for as long as they have to, before they start to sell their work - or give up and get a paying job.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Saatchi: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I hate to sound like a romantic adolescent, but I believe artists don't generally see art as a ca…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, art pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e art.

frase_original: I hate to sound like a romantic adolescent, but I believe artists don't generally see art as a career choice; they simply can't overcome their desire to make art, and will live on little income for as long as they have to, before they start to sell their work - or give up and get a paying job.
